response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content to identify VTubers Nekomata Okayu and Inugami Korone and the song title 'Airman ga Taosenai' via on-screen credits. 2. Performed a web search for the lyrics using the composer 'Sera' and the song title in Japanese. 3. Retrieved the full Japanese lyrics from the search results. 4. Translated the lyrics into English. 5. Mapped the song to the vocal performance segment starting at 02:14.000. 6. Generated the structured JSON response.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTubers Nekomata Okayu and Inugami Korone hosting a stage performance segment, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'Airman ga Taosenai' (You Can't Defeat Airman).

scenes.description: VTubers Nekomata Okayu and Inugami Korone interact on stage and introduce their upcoming performance. No vocal music is playing.
Nekomata Okayu and Inugami Korone perform the song 'Airman ga Taosenai'. The stage visuals change to reflect the game theme.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
気がついたら同じ面ばかりプレイ
そしていつも同じ場所で死ぬ
諦めずに消える足場に挑戦するけど、すぐに下に落ちるよ
アイテム2号があれば楽に向こうの岸まで着くけど
何回やっても 何回やっても エアーマンが倒せないよ
あの竜巻何回やっても避けれない
うしろに回って撃ち続けてもいずれは風に飛ばされる
タイム連打も試してみたけど竜巻相手じゃ意味が無い
だから次は絶対勝つために僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく

気がついたらライフももう少ししかない
そしていつもそこでE缶使う
諦めずにエアーマンまでたどり着くけれど、すぐに残機なくなる
リーフシールドがあれば楽にエアーマンを倒せるけど
何回やっても 何回やっても ウッドマンが倒せないよ
落ちる木の葉は何回やっても避けれない
後に下がって距離をとってもいずれは距離を詰められる
タイム連打も試してみたけどあいつのジャンプはくぐれない
だから次は絶対勝つために僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく

アイテム2号があれば楽に向こうの岸まで着くけど
何回やっても 何回やっても エアーマンが倒せないよ
あの竜巻何回やっても避けれない
うしろに回って撃ち続けてもいずれは風に飛ばされる
タイム連打も試してみたけど竜巻相手じゃ意味が無い
だから次は絶対勝つために僕はE缶だけは最後までとっておく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
When I realize it, I'm playing the same level, and I always die in the same place.
I don't give up and try the disappearing platforms, but I fall right down.
If I had Item 2, I could easily reach the other side, but...
No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try, I can't defeat Airman!
No matter how many times I try to avoid that tornado, I can't.
Even if I go behind and keep shooting, eventually I get blown away by the wind.
I tried hitting the button repeatedly, but it's useless against the tornado.
So, next time, to win for sure, I'll save my E-Can until the very end.

When I realize it, I have only a little life left, and I always use my E-Can there.
I don't give up and reach Airman, but I immediately run out of lives.
If I had the Leaf Shield, I could easily defeat Airman, but...
No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try, I can't defeat Woodman!
No matter how many times I try to avoid the falling leaves, I can't.
Even if I step back and keep my distance, eventually I get cornered.
I tried hitting the button repeatedly, but I can't get past his jumps.
So, next time, to win for sure, I'll save my E-Can until the very end.

If I had Item 2, I could easily reach the other side, but...
No matter how many times I try, no matter how many times I try, I can't defeat Airman!
No matter how many times I try to avoid that tornado, I can't.
Even if I go behind and keep shooting, eventually I get blown away by the wind.
I tried hitting the button repeatedly, but it's useless against the tornado.
So, next time, to win for sure, I'll save my E-Can until the very end.
